mapper.select: SELECT * FROM items WHERE board_id = #{boardId}::uuid ORDER BY position ASC, created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM items WHERE group_id = #{groupId}::uuid ORDER BY position ASC, created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM items WHERE parent_item_id = #{parentItemId}::uuid ORDER BY position ASC, created_at DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO items (id, board_id, group_id, parent_item_id, name, position, is_archived, created_by, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ( #{id}::uuid, #{boardId}::uuid, #{groupId}::uuid,
#{parentItemId}::uuid NULL , #{name}, #{position}, #{isArchived}, #{createdBy}::uuid, COALESCE(#{createdAt}, NOW()), COALESCE(#{updatedAt}, NOW()) )
mapper.update: UPDATE items SET name = #{name}, group_id = #{groupId}::uuid, parent_item_id = #{parentItemId}::uuid NULL , position = #{position}, is_archived = #{isArchived}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}::uuid
